content: Phase 1: Core POC — Zite connectivity, writes, junction edges, Claude grounding (DONE)
Phase 2: Seed Zite with real data — 32 providers, 28 signals, 54 connectors, 119 provider_signals, 32 aggregator_providers, 49 provider_universes (DONE)
Phase 3: FastAPI backend — graph/provider/universes/crawl-jobs/intel SSE (DONE, tested)
Phase 4: React frontend — graph, tab filter, galaxy panel, intel sidebar, command palette, node SEO page (DONE, visually verified)
Phase 5: End-to-end testing via testing_agent_v3 + fix all issues
